narrative_beat: Wide de edificios P&B com ceu em chamas, vela judaica quebrada no chao

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a broken Shabbat candle lying on the ground over a Star of David mosaic, in rich warm tones, with a burning cityscape in the background
subject.focal_point: the broken candle with its flame still flickering on the ground
subject.secondary: City buildings burning in the distance. Fiery sky overhead.
props: broken Shabbat candle with flickering flame

environment.location: a city plaza with modernist architecture

composition.foreground: broken candle and Star of David in warm rich gold and crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white burning buildings and fiery sky

lighting.key_light: fire glow from burning city casting warm light

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the attack on sacred ground — innocence destroyed

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
